title: Music Question
wikitext:
[]: Music Question             Quote Post by Nukie » Sun Mar 11, 2007 9:00 pm If this does not belong here, I apologize. Does anyone know the name of the music playing in EoE, that starts when GNR ascends from Terminal Dogma and where GNK reaches out to Shinji?

[]: Re: Music Question             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Mon Mar 12, 2007 12:13 am Nukie wrote: If this does not belong here, I apologize. Does anyone know the name of the music playing in EoE, that starts when GNR ascends from Terminal Dogma and where GNK reaches out to Shinji?

[]: Re: Music Question             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Mar 12, 2007 12:25 am kamiyoni wrote: Nukie wrote: If this does not belong here, I apologize. Does anyone know the name of the music playing in EoE, that starts when GNR ascends from Terminal Dogma and where GNK reaches out to Shinji?

[]: Re: Music Question             Quote Post by C4 » Mon Mar 12, 2007 12:35 am Ornette wrote: He's talking about the song before it, not Komm Susser Tod. It's just choral, not instruments. I *think* on the S^2 works it's M-8, but don't quote me on it.

[]: Re: Music Question             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 12, 2007 6:30 am C4 wrote: (Or, I think another translation had "Return to the Beginning", which I liked better)
